description: A user accidentally signed up twice with two different email addresses and wants to merge their accounts.

nodes.task_description: Identify the two accounts the user wants to merge.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent locates both user accounts in the system.

nodes.task_description: Explain the merge process, including which email address will become the primary and that data will be combined.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent sets clear expectations for the merge process.

nodes.task_description: Execute the account merge tool, selecting one account as the primary and the other to be merged and deactivated.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully merges the two accounts into one.
